claims: The skill description claims "No API keys on free tiers" yet requires setting an OPENAI_API_KEY, indicating it sends REST API route definitions (potentially containing sensitive internal API structures) to a third-party AI service without clear disclosure of this data transmission in the primary skill description. This contradicts the "no sign-ups, no API keys" claim and exposes proprietary code to external servers.
